subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Tree of Spirit unto him who hath believed in God, then was guided, and hath hearkened to the Call of God from beyond the crimson sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من شجره الروح للذی آمن بالله ثم هدی و سمع ندآء الله عن وراء قلزم
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
